stories.title: Reconstruct JDBC URL from split env vars with SSL enforcement
Add HikariCP connection pool tuning block
Remove hardcoded credentials from application-dev.yml
Add Flyway migration V16: create projects table
Add Flyway migration V17: add project_id to boards

Add Flyway migration V19: schema corrections for activity_log, comments, and labels
Add app favicon and document head metadata
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN frontend/public has only .gitkeep WHEN favicon added+referenced THEN tab shows icon
GIVEN any route WHEN loaded THEN no /favicon.ico 404

stories.title: Fix column reorder not refreshing the DOM
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN reorder PATCH 200 WHEN drag completes THEN DOM order updates without refresh
GIVEN failed reorder WHEN error THEN optimistic rollback

stories.title: Render logout control wired to authStore.logout()
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN logout() exists WHEN control clicked THEN logout runs + redirect to login
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Fix mobile theme section blocked by BottomNav
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN <768px WHEN ThemeSwitcher open THEN not overlapped by BottomNav
GIVEN fixed BottomNav WHEN scroll bottom THEN padding-bottom = nav height

stories.title: Make left Sidebar collapsible
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN expanded WHEN toggle THEN collapses to rail
GIVEN state WHEN reload THEN persists
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Fix horizontal board scroll and modal overflow
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN many columns WHEN render THEN board scrolls horizontally in container
GIVEN modal WHEN open THEN constrained on-screen, scrollable
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V21: create refresh_tokens store (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V20 WHEN V21 runs THEN refresh_tokens table+indexes exist
VERIFY reversible + validated on non-prod DB

stories.title: Backend: short-lived access token + refresh issuance/rotation
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN login WHEN response THEN <=15m access + persisted refresh
GIVEN valid refresh WHEN /auth/refresh THEN new access + rotate
GIVEN expired/unknown WHEN refresh THEN 401
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Backend: revoke refresh token on logout (revocation/denylist)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN session WHEN /auth/logout THEN revoked_at set
GIVEN revoked WHEN refresh THEN 401
GIVEN reused token WHEN presented THEN 401 + family revoked
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Frontend: silent token refresh + logout wired to endpoints
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN 401/pre-expiry WHEN call THEN refresh once + retry transparently
GIVEN logout WHEN run THEN /auth/logout + clear + redirect
GIVEN failed refresh WHEN occurs THEN redirect login (no loop)
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: INVESTIGATE & verify workspace backend
stories.scope_flag: may expand into US-1302 if backend gaps found (expected: none)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN WorkspaceController endpoints WHEN exercised THEN documented success/403
GIVEN gap WHEN found THEN schedule US-1302 else close it

stories.title: CONTINGENT: fix workspace backend gaps from US-1301
stories.scope_flag: closed not-needed — US-1301 found no backend gaps; WorkspaceController fully implemented
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN gaps recorded WHEN fixed THEN JUnit proves behavior
GIVEN no gaps WHEN triaged THEN close not-needed

stories.title: Workspace management UI: create / rename / delete
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN manage surface WHEN used THEN create/rename/delete with optimistic UI
GIVEN non-owner WHEN open THEN destructive disabled
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Workspace member-management UI (list/add/remove)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN workspace WHEN open THEN members listed
GIVEN add form WHEN submit email THEN 201 + list updates
GIVEN member row WHEN remove THEN DELETE + row gone
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Fix column color: allow re-opening picker to change set color
stories.scope_flag: investigation resolved DOWN: frontend-only, backend already supports repeat updates
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN color set WHEN menu open THEN picker available again
GIVEN new color WHEN confirm THEN PATCH columns/{id} + re-render
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V22: add description to boards (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V21 WHEN V22 runs THEN boards.description nullable
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated

acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Board+CreateBoardRequest WHEN updated THEN description accepted on create/update + in response
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Richer create-board modal: themed UI + description field
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN modal WHEN open THEN matches active theme tokens
GIVEN name+description WHEN submit THEN board created with description
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Extend theme token model for gradient/texture backgrounds
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN 3 flat themes WHEN extended THEN background token supports color|gradient|texture without breaking existing
VERIFY existing 3 themes unchanged desktop+mobile

stories.title: Add several new gradient/texture themes
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN extended model WHEN new themes added THEN appear in ThemeSwitcher + apply
GIVEN selected WHEN reload THEN persists
VERIFY contrast readable desktop+mobile

stories.title: Migration V23: add color field to cards (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V22 WHEN V23 runs THEN cards.color nullable free-form hex
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated

stories.title: Backend: card color in model/request/response
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN card model+DTO WHEN updated THEN free-form hex accepted on PATCH + in response
GIVEN invalid hex WHEN submit THEN 422
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Free-form hex/color-wheel picker for columns AND cards
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN column WHEN picker open THEN any hex via wheel/input or preset -> PATCH headerColor
GIVEN card WHEN picker open THEN any hex -> PATCH color
GIVEN picker WHEN render THEN reuses theme tokens
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V24: modules/tags (board-scoped) + card_modules join (reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V23 WHEN V24 runs THEN modules table (board_id FK) + card_modules join + indexes
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated; no impact on cards

stories.title: Backend: modules/tags CRUD + assign/unassign to cards
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN board WHEN POST module THEN created+listable; PATCH rename; DELETE detaches
GIVEN card WHEN assign/unassign THEN join updated + in response
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Backend: swimlane group-by config persisted per board
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN board WHEN set group-by none|assignee|priority|module THEN persisted + returned on load
GIVEN module group-by WHEN no modules THEN valid empty grouping
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Frontend: real swimlanes — group-by rendering with DnD assignment
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN group-by picked WHEN render THEN real horizontal lanes per group + None lane
GIVEN card dragged across lanes WHEN dropped THEN attribute updates+persists
GIVEN group-by WHEN reload THEN restored
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V25: create issues table (child of story-cards, reversible)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN at V24 WHEN V25 runs THEN issues table with nullable parent_card_id FK + index
GIVEN no parent WHEN created THEN standalone persists
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated

stories.title: Backend: issue CRUD + attach/detach to story-card (manual close)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN POST /issues WHEN called THEN standalone issue; GET lists+filters
GIVEN PATCH parent WHEN set/clear THEN attach/detach
GIVEN PATCH status closed WHEN called THEN closes; parent card close does NOT auto-close
VERIFY JUnit

stories.title: Frontend: create-issue UI, attach/detach UI, issues view
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN issues view WHEN load THEN lists issues + create
GIVEN story-card detail WHEN open THEN attach/detach + see attached
GIVEN issue WHEN close manually THEN status updates; no auto-close
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Migration V26: convert role strings to OWNER/ADMIN/MEMBER/VIEWER (reversible, data-safe)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN free-string roles WHEN V26 runs THEN normalized to enum set + CHECK/enum constraint
GIVEN owners WHEN migrated THEN OWNER assigned where determinable; VIEWER preserved
VERIFY reversible + non-prod validated; zero rows lost

stories.title: Backend: Role enum + central authorization policy across controllers
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN bare strings WHEN replaced THEN Role enum + central policy (extend BoardAccessPolicy / add WorkspaceAccessPolicy)
GIVEN each mutating controller WHEN request THEN policy enforced (VIEWER ro, MEMBER edit, ADMIN members, OWNER full)
VERIFY JUnit role x action matrix

stories.title: Backend: assign/authorize roles per workspace and per board (API)
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN member WHEN PATCH role THEN changes (only OWNER/ADMIN; only OWNER grants OWNER)
GIVEN access grant/deny WHEN applied THEN policy honors immediately
VERIFY JUnit allowed+forbidden

stories.title: Frontend: user-management UI to view/assign roles and authorize access
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN workspace/board WHEN open THEN members+roles listed + change role
GIVEN insufficient role WHEN view THEN controls disabled per policy
GIVEN role change WHEN succeeds THEN capabilities update
VERIFY desktop and mobile

stories.title: Add Issues link to desktop sidebar nav
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN any protected page WHEN sidebar renders THEN Issues nav item appears linking to /issues
GIVEN on /issues WHEN sidebar renders THEN Issues item is active/highlighted
GIVEN click Issues WHEN nav completes THEN IssuesPanel content visible

stories.title: Add Issues link to mobile bottom nav
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN mobile viewport WHEN BottomNav renders THEN Issues tab appears linking to /issues
GIVEN on /issues WHEN BottomNav renders THEN Issues tab shows in active color
GIVEN 375px viewport WHEN Issues tab added THEN no overflow or truncation

stories.title: Status filter tabs on the Issues page
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN /issues loaded WHEN page first renders THEN ALL filter selected and all issues shown
GIVEN OPEN filter active WHEN render THEN only OPEN issues visible; no extra API call
GIVEN ALL filter WHEN click THEN all issues shown again
GIVEN CLOSED filter active WHEN issue closed THEN issue disappears from view immediately
VERIFY filter state lives in page not IssuesPanel (panel reused in CardModal)

stories.title: Migration V28: workspace_id_counters table
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Flyway at V27 WHEN V28 runs THEN workspace_id_counters exists with (workspace_id UUID FK, item_type VARCHAR(10), last_counter INTEGER DEFAULT 0) PK(workspace_id,item_type)
GIVEN V28 ran WHEN V28 undo runs THEN table dropped cleanly
GIVEN two concurrent transactions on same row WHEN FOR UPDATE used THEN only one writes at a time

stories.title: Migration V29: add type + readable_id to tasks table
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Flyway at V28 WHEN V29 runs THEN tasks.type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'STORY' CHECK IN ('STORY','FEATURE','BUG')
GIVEN V29 ran THEN tasks.readable_id VARCHAR(20) NULL exists
GIVEN V29 undo runs THEN both columns dropped cleanly

stories.title: Migration V30: add type + readable_id to issues table
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Flyway at V29 WHEN V30 runs THEN issues.type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BUG' CHECK IN ('STORY','FEATURE','BUG')
GIVEN V30 ran THEN issues.readable_id VARCHAR(20) NULL exists
GIVEN V30 undo runs THEN both columns dropped cleanly

stories.title: Migration V31: back-fill readable_ids for all existing tasks and issues
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN existing tasks WHEN V31 runs THEN every task has non-null readable_id formatted <PREFIX>-NNN zero-padded 3 digits
GIVEN existing issues WHEN V31 runs THEN every issue has non-null readable_id
GIVEN back-fill ordering THEN within each workspace earliest created_at gets counter 1 per type
GIVEN workspace_id_counters WHEN V31 completes THEN each (workspace_id,item_type) has last_counter = highest assigned
GIVEN V31 undo THEN readable_id set NULL on all tasks/issues; counter rows deleted

stories.title: Backend: ReadableIdService — atomic counter allocation
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN allocate(workspaceId, itemType) called inside @Transactional THEN SELECT FOR UPDATE increments counter and returns formatted string
GIVEN itemType=STORY THEN prefix 'US', format 'US-NNN'
GIVEN itemType=FEATURE THEN prefix 'FEAT', format 'FEAT-NNN'
GIVEN itemType=BUG THEN prefix 'BUG', format 'BUG-NNN'
GIVEN no row exists WHEN allocate called THEN upsert initialises counter to 1
GIVEN two concurrent threads same workspace+type WHEN both complete THEN IDs are distinct
GIVEN JUnit THEN verify prefix mapping + zero-padding for counters 1,9,99,100,999

stories.title: Backend: type field in Card model, CreateCardRequest, UpdateCardRequest, CardResponse
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Card entity THEN has type String default 'STORY' mapped to tasks.type
GIVEN CreateCardRequest THEN has optional type field defaults STORY if absent
GIVEN UpdateCardRequest THEN has optional type field (null=no change)
GIVEN CardResponse THEN includes type String and readableId String
GIVEN POST card type='BUG' THEN response.type='BUG' readableId non-null
GIVEN type outside enum THEN 422 INVALID_TYPE
GIVEN JUnit THEN verify type defaults, update, invalid-type rejection

stories.title: Backend: CardService.createCard allocates readable_id via ReadableIdService
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN CardService.createCard THEN derives workspaceId via card->column->board->workspace
GIVEN workspaceId derived WHEN ReadableIdService.allocate called THEN readable_id set before save within same @Transactional
GIVEN card created THEN CardResponse.readableId non-null matching prefix+3-digit counter
GIVEN JUnit THEN POST card -> response.readableId matches expected prefix

stories.title: Backend: type field in Issue model, CreateIssueRequest, UpdateIssueRequest, IssueResponse
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Issue entity THEN has type String default 'BUG' mapped to issues.type
GIVEN CreateIssueRequest THEN has optional type defaults BUG
GIVEN IssueResponse THEN includes type String and readableId String
GIVEN POST issue type='FEATURE' THEN response.readableId prefix is 'FEAT'
GIVEN type outside enum THEN 422 INVALID_TYPE
GIVEN JUnit THEN verify type defaults + readableId non-null on creation

stories.title: Backend: IssueService.createIssue allocates readable_id — workspace resolution for issues
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN issue with parentCard THEN workspaceId derived from parentCard->column->board->workspace
GIVEN standalone issue THEN workspaceId from CreateIssueRequest.workspaceId field (required when no parentCard)
GIVEN workspaceId resolved WHEN allocate called THEN readable_id set within same @Transactional
GIVEN IssueResponse THEN readableId non-null
GIVEN JUnit THEN POST issue (with and without parentCard) -> readableId non-null correct prefix

stories.title: Migration V32: tighten readable_id to NOT NULL on tasks and issues
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN V31 ran and all rows have readable_id WHEN V32 runs THEN ALTER TABLE tasks readable_id SET NOT NULL succeeds
GIVEN V32 ran THEN ALTER TABLE issues readable_id SET NOT NULL succeeds
GIVEN V32 undo THEN both columns set back to nullable

stories.title: Frontend: add type and readableId to CardResponse and IssueResponse TypeScript types
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN CardResponse in types/api.ts WHEN updated THEN has type: 'STORY'|'FEATURE'|'BUG' and readableId: string
GIVEN IssueResponse WHEN updated THEN has type: 'STORY'|'FEATURE'|'BUG' and readableId: string
GIVEN TypeScript compile THEN zero new type errors

stories.title: Frontend: replace UUID stub with readableId on CardItem chip
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN card.readableId='US-003' WHEN CardItem renders THEN badge shows 'US-003' not UUID stub
GIVEN card.readableId=null WHEN CardItem renders THEN badge shows UUID stub as fallback
GIVEN board view THEN no runtime errors

stories.title: Frontend: show readableId in CardModal header
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN CardModal opens for card readableId='FEAT-007' WHEN header renders THEN 'FEAT-007' displayed near title
GIVEN card.readableId=null THEN falls back to UUID stub without error
GIVEN mobile viewport THEN readableId visible not clipped

stories.title: Frontend: show readableId in IssuesPanel list rows
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN IssuesPanel renders issues WHEN each row displays THEN readableId shown (e.g. 'BUG-002') as leading badge before title
GIVEN issue.readableId=null THEN no crash; ID slot empty or dash
GIVEN /issues page and CardModal issues tab THEN readableId visible in both

stories.title: Frontend: type dropdown in card create flow
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN card-create UI WHEN rendered THEN dropdown with Story/Feature/Bug appears; defaults Story
GIVEN user selects Bug WHEN submit THEN POST body includes type='BUG'
GIVEN card created THEN readableId with 'BUG-' prefix visible on chip immediately
GIVEN mobile THEN type selector usable without overflow

stories.title: Frontend: type dropdown in issue create flow
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN IssuesPanel create form WHEN rendered THEN type selector with Story/Feature/Bug; defaults Bug
GIVEN user selects Story WHEN submit THEN POST body includes type='STORY'
GIVEN issue created THEN readableId with 'US-' prefix visible in list immediately
GIVEN mobile THEN type selector usable

stories.title: Extract ColorPalette into a shared ui component
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN ColorPalette inline in Column.tsx WHEN extracted to frontend/src/components/ui/ColorPalette.tsx THEN exported as named export with identical prop signature
GIVEN Column.tsx after move WHEN saved THEN imports ColorPalette from @/components/ui/ColorPalette; inline definition removed
GIVEN column color picker WHEN used THEN identical behaviour to before extraction (swatches, hex input, clear, close-on-outside-click)
GIVEN active token color WHEN palette opens THEN active swatch has accent outline

stories.title: Wire ColorPalette into CardModal replacing the broken hex-only input
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN CardModal color PropRow WHEN replaced THEN broken hex input removed; ColorPalette popup with swatches, hex input, clear button appears on trigger click
GIVEN swatch clicked WHEN onSelect fires THEN handleCardColor called, PATCH fires, popup closes, trigger updates
GIVEN valid 6-digit hex typed WHEN Enter pressed THEN handleCardColor fires
GIVEN valid 6-digit hex typed WHEN onBlur fires THEN handleCardColor fires (onBlur commit)
GIVEN invalid/partial hex WHEN onBlur fires THEN handleCardColor NOT called
GIVEN None button clicked THEN handleCardColor(null) fires, color cleared
GIVEN click outside popup THEN popup closes, no color change
GIVEN PATCH fails THEN card color rolls back to pre-click value
